bracket.empty: The knockout bracket isn't available yet.

map.hint: Click a country on the map to see its team.

prefs.title: Preferences
prefs.hint: Saved to your account and restored when you sign in. Until then, your browser and system settings are used.
prefs.crowdHint: Under each prediction, the combined score of all players (1-1 + 2-1 + 4-0 shows as 7-2).
prefs.privateProfileHint: Step out of the global and competition rankings. Only members of your leagues (and admins) can see your profile; your league rankings still include you. Predictions stay in the anonymous crowd totals.
prefs.oddsHint: Decimal 1X2 odds under each match: 1 = home win, X = draw, 2 = away win. Lower number = more likely. Snapshotted at kickoff.

odds.title: Bookmaker odds — 1: home win, X: draw, 2: away win. Decimal odds; the lower the number, the more likely the outcome.

home.tagline: Predict football scores, earn points for how close you get, and out-foresee your friends on the global ranking.

landing.sub: Nostragoalus turns football tournaments into a prediction game - call the scores, earn points for how close you get, and climb the leaderboard.
landing.featuresSub: From closeness scoring to live brackets and an interactive world map.

scoring.d: Points scale with accuracy - nail the exact score, the goal difference, or just the right outcome.

joker.d: Double the points on one match per round when you're feeling confident.

champion.d: Call the tournament winner for a season-long bonus - the longer the odds at pick time, the bigger the reward.

live.d: Scores, stats and the standings update in real time over WebSockets - watch the table move as the goals go in.

bracket.d: Follow the road to the final on a clean, two-sided bracket.

map.d: Pick a country on a world map for its squad, form, standings and next match.

stats.d: Possession, cards, attendance, goal timeline and each team's top scorer & passer.

ranking.d: Compete per competition or on the all-time global leaderboard.

competitions.d: World Cup 2026, World Cup 2022 and UEFA Euro 2024 - switch in a click.

bestScorer.d: Pick who you think finishes the tournament's top scorer for an extra bonus at the final.

leagues.d: Spin up a league for friends, family or the office - share a code and race for top spot; your predictions stay yours.

bot.d: A virtual player that always picks the crowd's most-common scoreline - beat the wisdom of the crowd to prove your edge.

landing.scoringSub: Scored on the 90-minute result. The closer you are, the more you earn.
landing.ctaSub: Create an account, invite your friends, and see who really knows their football.
landing.showcaseSub: A tournament with two dozen oracles already arguing.

fixtures.d: Inline score inputs, kickoff countdowns, the crowd's combined call under every match, and your crowned champion watching over it all.

match.d: Goals, cards and substitutions laced on one timeline, official stats, head-to-head back to the archives.

bracket.d: A real two-sided bracket with penalty shootouts where they happened.

map.t: A world cup on a world map
map.d: Every team where it lives - squads, form and standings one click away.

ranking.d: Per-competition and global leaderboards, with movement arrows and medals.

team.d: Official squads with positions, the manager, and tournament stats that match the federations' own numbers.

matches.title: Fixtures
matches.empty: No fixtures yet - import them from the admin page.

predictions.empty: You haven't made any predictions yet.
predictions.publicNote: Only predictions for matches that have kicked off are shown.
predictions.jokerError: Couldn't move the joker - a match may have already started.
predictions.finalDoubleHint: Every prediction on the final earns double points - no joker needed.
predictions.rarityTip: Only {pct}% of players picked this exact score - bold calls earn a bonus.
predictions.rarityTipNoShare: A rare exact score earns a bonus on top.
predictions.jokerHint: Your joker doubled the points on this match (base + rarity).
predictions.adminUpcomingDivider: Upcoming matches below — only admins see picks before kickoff

champion.title: Your champion
champion.hint: Bonus if your pick lifts the trophy · long shots pay more · locks at the first kickoff.

bestScorer.title: Your best scorer
bestScorer.hint: Bonus if your pick wins the Golden Boot · locks at the first kickoff.

leaderboard.title: Ranking
leaderboard.empty: No scores yet - predictions get scored once matches finish.
leaderboard.livePointsHint: Provisional points from matches in progress — updates as scores change.

bot.name: Crowd Bot
bot.note: Predicts the most common score picked by all players - or the average. It doesn't affect anyone's rank.
bot.adminUpcoming: Admin view: consensus for upcoming matches is included - players only see kicked-off matches.
bot.empty: No consensus yet - it appears once players start predicting.
bot.modeDisabled: Too few predictions - the most-picked score would be biased, so the average is shown.

match.h2hNone: These teams have never met in our records - this would be the first.

auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.ssoFailed: Single sign-on failed. Please try again or contact your administrator.
auth.ssoDomainWarn: Sign-in for this email domain is managed by {name}. You can still create a separate password account, but SSO is the expected way in.
auth.resetHint: Enter your email and we will send you a link to set a new password.
auth.resetSent: If an account exists for this address, a reset link is on its way.
auth.resetDone: Password updated - you can sign in now.
auth.resetInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

account.title: Account
account.profileHint: When changing your email, you'll need to confirm the new address first.
account.passwordHint: Update the password associated with your account.
account.dangerHint: Deleting your account is irreversible - all your predictions are lost.
account.confirmDeleteHint: Enter your password to confirm deletion.
account.ssoManagedHint: This account signs in through your organization's identity provider. Email, password, two-factor and passkeys are managed there.
account.deleteMailHint: A confirmation link will be sent to your email address - the account is only deleted once you click it.
account.deleteMailSent: Confirmation mail sent - the account will be deleted when you open the link.

sso.title: Single Sign-On
sso.hint: Configure OIDC, SAML or Google identity providers. Client secrets are envelope-encrypted at rest.
sso.providerIdHint: Becomes part of the IdP callback URL - it cannot be changed after registration.
sso.issuerHint: Endpoints are auto-discovered from the issuer's /.well-known/openid-configuration.
sso.secretKeep: Leave blank to keep the stored value.
sso.setupTitle: Configure your IdP with these values
sso.editing: Editing provider "{id}" - type and ID are fixed; blank secrets keep their stored value.
sso.displayNameHint: Shown to players (signup warning, messages). Optional.
sso.autoJoinLeaguesHint: Users signing in through this provider are added to these leagues (unless they previously left).
sso.syncAutoJoinHint: Join existing users to their provider leagues by email domain.

users.title: Users
users.hint: Create users, promote them to admin, or remove them.

data.title: Data
data.hint: Import fixtures and trigger live-score / finalize tasks.
data.importTip: Fetch and store every fixture of all active competitions (first-time setup).
data.refreshTip: Re-sync fixtures from the provider - fills newly decided knockout teams, never overwrites finished scores.
data.pollTip: Fetch live scores right now (also runs automatically every 2 minutes during live windows).
data.finalizeTip: Lock due predictions, score finished matches, award points and refresh the rankings.
data.oddsTip: Snapshot bookmaker odds for the current round (self-gates: every 6h, tightening to 30min in the last 2h before kickoff; the next round starts once this one finishes).
data.oddsBackfillTip: Recover closing odds for finished matches of past tournaments. Capped per run - re-trigger until 'remaining' reaches 0.

leagues.title: Leagues
leagues.hint: Private leagues group players; public ones are open to everyone. SSO providers can auto-join their users.
leagues.name: Name
leagues.deleteConfirm: Delete this league for every member?
leagues.pruneConfirm: Permanently delete every league without a single member? Their join codes stop working. This cannot be undone.

twofa.sectionHint: A second step at sign-in: an authenticator app (or a code by email when configured).
twofa.scan: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then enter a 6-digit code to confirm.
twofa.backupHintLong: Backup codes - store them somewhere safe; each one works once if you lose your authenticator.
twofa.title: Two-step verification
twofa.hint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
twofa.otpHint: Enter the code we emailed you.
twofa.backupHint: Enter one of your backup codes.
twofa.emailUnavailable: Email codes are not available on this server.
twofa.secretHint: Can't scan? Enter this key manually in your authenticator app.
twofa.regenHint: Backup codes are single-use. Generate a fresh set anytime; the old ones stop working.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.hint: Sign in with your device (fingerprint, face, security key) instead of a password.
passkeys.name: Name

about.title: About
about.intro: Nostragoalus is an open-source football prediction game: call the scores, earn points for how close you get, and out-foresee your friends.
about.aiText: This entire application - code, design, translations and even the artwork pipeline - was built in collaboration with Claude (Anthropic), with a human football fan directing every decision. The AI wrote the code; the humans own the opinions.
about.stackSub: The open-source software this app stands on. Every card links to the project; the badge links to its license.
about.dataText: Match data comes from publicly accessible FIFA and UEFA endpoints (unofficial, read-only, politely rate-limited). Map tiles by OpenStreetMap contributors. This project is not affiliated with or endorsed by FIFA or UEFA.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.sub: Everything you need before your first pick.

q1.a: Each match is scored on closeness: the exact score earns 3 points, the right goal difference 2, just the right outcome 1, and a miss 0. Nailing an exact score few others dared brings a rarity bonus on top.

q2.a: At kickoff, per match, enforced by the server - not your clock. Until then you can change your pick as often as you like, from the fixtures page, your picks, or the match view.

q3.a: Once per round you can mark one match as your joker: it doubles every point you earn on it. You can move it to another match in the same round as long as neither match has kicked off.

q4.a: Before the first kickoff, call the team that lifts the trophy. If you are right you collect a bonus at the final - bigger the bolder the call (the lower your pick's FIFA ranking at pick time, the more it pays) - and your crowned flag watches over your fixtures all tournament long.

q5.a: Only after a match kicks off. Your pending predictions are private, so nobody can copy your genius before lock.

q6.q: What about extra time and penalties?
q6.a: Predictions are scored on the final score of play; penalty shootouts decide who advances but never your points. A knockout draw that goes to penalties scores as a draw.

q7.q: Where does the data come from?
q7.a: From publicly accessible FIFA and UEFA endpoints: fixtures, live scores (about every two minutes during matches), squads, and stats. The world map is OpenStreetMap.

q8.a: Completely. The whole project is open source under the WTFPL - you can read every line, run your own instance for your friends, and do what you want with it.

formula.a: Every prediction is scored on the regulation (90-minute) result. The full formula:
formula.example: Example: you call Brazil 2-1 and it finishes 2-1 - an exact score (3). Among everyone who also saw the Brazil win, only ~4% nailed 2-1, so the rarity tier adds +4, for 7 points. On the final, or with your joker, it doubles.

q9.q: What is the Golden Boot pick?
q9.a: Alongside your champion, pick the player you think finishes the tournament's top scorer. Everyone who picked a player tied for the most goals (own goals excluded) collects a bonus at the final.

q10.a: Leagues are groups scoped to a competition, private (shareable code) or public. Create one or join your friends' - your predictions are always yours; leagues just filter the rankings and crowd stats to that group.

q11.a: Yes. While matches are in play the leaderboard shows provisional standings - your in-progress picks scored at the current scoreline, updating live as the goals go in. The group tables on a match move live too.

err.notFound: This one sailed over the bar - the page you're looking for is lost among the stars.
err.generic: Something went wrong on our side.

leagues.crowdBonusHint: Crowd bonus points are always based on everyone's predictions, not only your league.
